I think those news titles are negociation cards against Trump. He plays way too hard and he must take some steps back. But we'll see where this goes in the near future.

comment.body:
How many of Alma’s theories are inter-dependent vs mutually exclusive. That is the question that I ponder. 

1. Is trump doing the tariffs in order to create a negative wealth effect that will kill stagflation (ie deflation)?

2. Does there need to be deflation in order for the Holy Alliance 2.0 to form (and for china to loosen financial ties with the US)?

3. Does a Russia - Ukraine peace deal, which seems an afterthought compared to the impact tariffs are having on US - globalist country relations, cause the ripple effect Alma was thinking would happen back in late Feb? What is still at stake here? I did see a financial juice tweet today quoting trump as saying “making progress getting Russia-Ukraine war stopped”.

4. What mutual interest do the US and Russia and ME have in common other than the common enemy (China) and is it enough to necessitate a Holy Alliance 2.0?
Will it turn out to be real? If the alliance does not actually form, then the tariff war is literally just a tariff war and not a larger ploy to entangle these 3 countries foreign interests into an alliance. 

5. And it would see, completely plausible to me then that Occam’s Razor turns out to be the case and the simple explanation that trump is forcing tariffs solely for US interests alone in conjunction with DOGE efforts to improve our countries fiscal deficit by lowering costs and increasing revenues by tariff. This would then also imply that what we are going through now is episodic and likely to pass over like the many recession era crises our nation has faced before.  Covid / great financial crisis / dot com bubble burst. And we’ll have the fed there to backstop us with supply side stimulus. As they say don’t fight the fed….

All the more reason why I’d rather be long stocks during this uncertainty which I tend to think will eventually pass in 2-3 months time when QE rescues us out of recession once again. 

So I’m not doubting Alma’s theories. I’m just thinking of the simplest explanation I can in order to consider alternative unknown. paths forward which are as equally possible as her unknown path.

comment.body: The relationships between any nations are fluid, not fixed. Currently, the conservative policies pursued by Trump conflict with the left-wing ideologies of the EU, which will widen the rift between the U.S. and the EU. At the same time, Europe's economy is heading toward recession, making it increasingly reliant on a country that can supply affordable goods—China. Additionally, strengthening trade ties with China could serve as a measure to revitalize its economy.
comment.raw_body: The relationships between any nations are fluid, not fixed. At the same time, Europe's economy is heading toward recession, making it increasingly reliant on a country that can supply affordable goods—China. Additionally, strengthening trade ties with China could serve as a measure to revitalize its economy.

comment.body:
In my eyes, this is what it is advertised on paper. At the end our votes in reality mean nothing. It is all great propaganda to make people think they can go one Sunday, place your vote and you feel entitled to have contributed with your opinion.  But really the votes of the people decide very few things. Not trying to offend anyone but this is how I feel.

I understand the people who go and vote, but myself personally, I have not been doing that for long time already. Because I do not believe it matters unfortunately :(
